title: Mango Meadows
tagline: Mango Meadows — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: Mango Meadows is an agricultural theme park in Kaduthuruthy, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Mango Meadows is an agricultural theme park in Kaduthuruthy, Kerala, India. With more than 4800 species of plants, including 1900 species of medicinal plants, 700 species of trees, and 900 species of flowering plants, it is one of the most biodiverse places on earth. Rare species like the Ficus alii tree or Ficus maclellandii, Beggar’s bowl or Calabash, Camphor tree or Cinnamomum camphora, Damas tree or Conocarpus lancifolius, Kattupoovarash or Rhododendron arboreum, Rudraksha or Elaeocarpus ganitrus are present in the park. The main attractions in the park are the Eden Garden, Nakshatra Vriks

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Statue of Parashurama
topPlaces.description: The tallest Statue of Parashurama is located at Mango meadows Agricultural Theme Park, Kaduthuruthy, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Ayamkudy
topPlaces.description: Ayamkudy is a village in the Kottayam district of the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Adithyapuram Sun Temple
topPlaces.description: Adithyapuram Surya Temple is a Hindu temple located in Iravimangalam near Kaduthuruthy in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is noted mainly as the only 'Adithya' (Hindu solar deity) shrine in the state.

topPlaces.name: Memury
topPlaces.description: Memury is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kaduthuruthy
topPlaces.description: Kaduthuruthy is a town in Kottayam District in the state of Kerala, India. The State Highway 15 connecting Ettumanoor to Vyttila passes through the town.The town is located 27 km from Kottayam, the district headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Muttuchira
topPlaces.description: Muttuchira is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Thalayolaparambu
topPlaces.description: Thalayolaparambu is a town situated in Kottayam district in Kerala, India. Spanning over an area of 19.3 square kilometres with a population of 22,571 people, this mini-town is home to some of the well-known personalities such as the former Chief minister of Travancore-Cochin A. J. John, Anaparambil, the late Malayalam novelist/writer Vaikom Muhammed Basheer, the former Chief Justice of India K. G. Balakrishnan, and KK. Thalayolaparambu also hosts the major market established during the administration of Velu Thampi Dalawa, and is one of those few Keralite markets that still retains its old-world charm till date.

topPlaces.name: Manjoor (village)
topPlaces.description: Manjoor is a village located in the northern part of the Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. It lies approximately 20 kilometers north of the district capital, Kottayam, and is situated along the Kottayam–Vaikom bus route.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mango Meadows?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mango Meadows is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mango Meadows?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (46 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (32 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mango Meadows?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mango Meadows at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mango Meadows?
faq.a: Stays in Mango Meadows start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mango Meadows?
faq.a: The top attractions are Statue of Parashurama, Ayamkudy, Adithyapuram Sun Temple, Memury, Kaduthuruthy.
